direction.description: Parser bounds for OSCORE/CBOR structures must be enforced at runtime.

spec_ref.quote_or_summary: Exact standard mapping is pending CVE review.

statement: Malformed OSCORE/CBOR structures must be checked by runtime bounds validation in release builds before byte consumption or allocation-size computation.
condition: An endpoint parses OSCORE/CBOR data from peer-controlled CoAP negotiation or response messages.
expected_behavior: Bounds checks execute in production builds and reject malformed structures before out-of-bounds reads.
violation_pattern: Bounds are enforced only with debug assertions, so release builds continue parsing malformed structures.
bound_goal: Secure context negotiation and parser termination/safety

review.review_notes: Needs OSCORE RFC mapping before use in direction abstraction.
